calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or Plaintiff's Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Construing the defendant's motion as a motion to compel further response to interrogatories, the motion is GRANTED. (Code of Civil Procedure sections 2030.300(a)(1), (2).) Plaintiff to serve substantive, verified responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Special Interrogatories, Set One with 10 days. The request for sanctions is GRANTED against plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $4,069.00 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.300(d), payable within 10 days.

Court to sign proposed order submitted by defense counsel.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Continued To Mar-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Set For Trial On Mar-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
